completed_tasks.name: config.json created (YOLO, standard, all agents, balanced)

decisions.decision: Booking is free — no payment required to schedule a lesson
decisions.rationale: Isaac's explicit preference: students shouldn't need to pay to book

decisions.decision: Cancellation fee: $50 charged to card on file, or added to next invoice if no card
Billing model: manual invoice (CFI marks complete → admin sends invoice → student pays)
decisions.rationale: Isaac chose manual over autopay; autopay deferred to v2

decisions.decision: profiles.is_instructor already exists — use two booleans (is_admin, is_instructor), not a role enum
decisions.rationale: Column exists in SETUP.sql; no migration needed; backward-compatible

decisions.decision: Phase 5 (Stripe upgrade) must be fully isolated — never concurrent with feature work
decisions.rationale: 12 files, breaking changes, live payment system

next_action: Run /gsd-plan-phase 1 to plan Phase 1: Security Hardening (4 plans: lib/auth.ts + middleware.ts, /manage auth guards, API route hardening, legacy /booking/ retirement)
context_notes: Project initialization complete. Isaac is a solo CFI at Republic Airport (FRG), Long Island. Long-term vision: Merlin Flight Training runs autonomously → expand into a cargo aviation company (Cessna Caravans). The career pipeline narrative ('train here, get hired here → become cargo pilot') is the primary public-side differentiator. The codebase is production, handling real students and payments. Phase 1 is a hard prerequisite for everything: lib/auth.ts extraction is the literal code dependency for Phase 3's requireCFI(). Stripe webhook dual-endpoint audit must happen during Phase 4 before Phase 5.
